name: Data Cleansing
description: One-stop data quality powerhouse – instantly clean dozens of common messy data issues: null handling, whitespace, unwanted characters, case standardization, and more. Perfect for preparing raw source data (CSV, Excel, APIs, logs) before analytics, modeling, or reporting.
input: It accepts DataFrame as input from the previous Node

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Select Columns
fields.description: Columns you want to clean. Leave empty to apply settings globally where it makes sense (e.g., trim whitespace on all string columns).

fields.name: removeNullRows
fields.title: Remove Null Rows
fields.description: Drop entire rows that contain nulls in the selected columns (or any column if none selected). Great for strict data quality requirements.

fields.name: removeNullColumns
fields.title: Remove Null Columns
fields.description: Drop entire columns that are completely null/empty. Useful after Union when some sources don’t have certain fields.

fields.name: replaceWithBlanks
fields.title: Replace Nulls To Blank (String fields)
fields.description: Replace nulls in string columns with empty string '' instead of literal 'null'. Makes downstream joins and reports look clean.

fields.name: replaceWithZero
fields.title: Replace Nulls To 0 (Numeric fields)
fields.description: Replace nulls in numeric columns with 0. Essential for aggregations (sum, avg) so nulls don’t skew results.

fields.name: trimWhitespace
fields.title: Trim Leading/Trailing Whitespace
fields.description: Remove spaces before/after text (e.g., ' John ' To 'John'). The #1 most common data issue!

fields.name: removeTabsLineBreaks
fields.title: Remove Tabs, Line Breaks & Duplicate Spaces
fields.description: Clean up copy-paste mess: replaces \t, \n, \r and multiple spaces with single space.

fields.name: allWhiteSpace
fields.title: All Whitespace Characters
fields.description: Remove every kind of whitespace (including non-breaking spaces).

fields.name: letters
fields.title: Letters (A-Z, a-z)
fields.description: Strip all letters - useful for extracting numbers from mixed fields.

fields.name: lettersExceptions
fields.title: Letters Exceptions
fields.description: Comma-separated letters to KEEP (e.g., 'A,E,I,O,U' to keep vowels).

fields.name: numbers
fields.title: Numbers (0-9)
fields.description: Strip all digits - perfect for cleaning names that contain numbers.

fields.name: numbersExceptions
fields.title: Numbers Exceptions
fields.description: Digits to KEEP (e.g., '123' to preserve house numbers).

fields.name: punctuationExceptions
fields.title: Punctuation Exceptions
fields.description: Symbols to KEEP (e.g., '.,-' for decimal numbers and names like O'Connor).

fields.name: modifyCase
fields.title: Modify Case
fields.description:
Standardize text case:
• Upper case To JOHN DOE
• Lower Case To john doe
• Title Case To John Doe
• Default To no change
